title: arrhenatherum elongatum
intro: Arrhenatherum elongatum, also known as False Oat Grass or Elongated Meadow Grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Arrhenatherum elongatum include reducing inflammation, calming the nervous system, and acting as an expectorant, making it useful for respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Arrhenatherum elongatum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
